name: Zhejiang Zhaolong Interconnect Technology Co., Limited
summary: Zhejiang Zhaolong Interconnect Technology Co., Limited manufactures and sells data communication cables and components in China and internationally. The company offers internal and external high-speed cables and solutions for cloud computing big data center switching and storage products; communication and data center cables; industrial and medical cables; and data, audio-visual, and control signal transmission and connection solutions for high-definition multimedia devices, VR wearable devices, PCs, drones, and other consumer products. Its products are used in communications and data centers, industrial and medical, high-end consumer electronics, and smart home and other fields. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Deqing, China.
